name: Ownership under uncertainty
description: Takes full responsibility for ambiguous problems; proactively scopes, executes, and closes loops without hand-holding.

levels.label: Emerging
behavioral_indicators: Waits for direction when scope shifts

levels.label: Solid
behavioral_indicators: Surfaces blockers but needs steering on ambiguity

levels.label: Strong
behavioral_indicators: Re-scopes ambiguous problems into shippable chunks

levels.label: Exceptional
behavioral_indicators: Anticipates undefined workstreams and leads them to outcomes
Creates leverage for others under high ambiguity
